origin.name: Guinea-Bissau
origin.key_document: Certidao de obito (death certificate in Portuguese, requires certified English translation)
origin.source: FCDO Guinea-Bissau travel advice, updated 2025; FCDO emergency line guidance
origin.cremation_note: Cremation is not widely available in Guinea-Bissau. Full body repatriation is the standard approach.

destinations.name: United Kingdom
key_documents: Certidao de obito (certified English translation required)
special_rules: There is no resident UK Embassy in Guinea-Bissau. Consular assistance is provided via Dakar (Senegal) or Lisbon.
All Portuguese-language documentation requires certified English translation for UK acceptance.
Contact the FCDO emergency line immediately: +44 (0)20 7008 5000.
Police clearance is required for all violent or suspicious deaths.
destinations.dest_reception: The UK funeral director takes custody at the cargo terminal. All documentation must be in certified English translation. The coroner for the district is notified. Straightforward cases proceed directly to funeral arrangements.
destinations.dest_consular_note: FCDO 24-hour emergency line: +44 (0)20 7008 5000. There is no resident UK Embassy in Guinea-Bissau; consular assistance is via Dakar or Lisbon. They cannot pay for or arrange repatriation.
destinations.seo_title: Guinea-Bissau to UK Repatriation: Family Guide
destinations.seo_description: Someone has died in Guinea-Bissau. Repatriation to the UK takes 3-6 weeks. FCDO via Dakar, Portuguese translation, and export permits all handled. Contact us 24/7.
